## Documentation

Check every item that applies. Leave unchecked items that are genuinely not affected.

- [ ] `config.example.yaml` changes reflected in `docs/configuration.md`
- [ ] New or promoted providers updated in `docs/providers.md`
- [ ] UI changes reflected in `mockup_dashboard.html`
- [ ] Feature changes reflected in `/help` content (`page.html`)
- [ ] `README.md` prerequisites and feature list current
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` module map, page list, and architecture invariants current

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/ -v` passes
- [ ] Dry-run tested where applicable (`--dry-run`)
